rationale.R1.1: The agent successfully identified the core conceptual issue and reframed the section effectively, providing a clear and well-supported contribution.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flagged some uncertainties but did not consistently mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output adhered closely to the agreed scope with only minor deviations.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions were introduced, and harmful content was actively avoided by removing unsupported claims.
rationale.RX.5: While major changes were traced, minor edits lacked proper annotation.
